name: Butterscotch Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, cream together 1/3 cup butter and brown sugar. Set aside with nuts.
2. In a large bowl, blend the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Cut in the cold butter until crumbly, making a well in the center. Pour milk into the well and stir to form a soft dough.
3. Knead the dough 8-10 times. On a lightly floured surface, roll out to a 9-inch square. Spread with the brown sugar mixture and sprinkle with nuts. Roll up like a jelly roll and pinch the edge to seal. Cut into 12 slices and place in a nonstick or greased 8" x 8 inch pan.
4. Bake at 425°F for 15-20 minutes. Invert onto a tray while hot.
